{{Quote|Most Xexto hate you side, other side both. But Billibango want to be Jedi, indeed yes!|Billibango|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 38">[[Star Wars (1998) 38|''Star Wars'' (1998) 38]]</ref>}}
'''Billibango''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] from [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]] who supported the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Unlike many of the other members of his species, he did not dislike the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and in fact wished to be one. In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], he helped the [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Republic force]] at [[Mount Avos]] by providing them with information on the mountain and its [[challat eater]]s. During the [[Fourth Battle of Qotile|fourth battle]] in the [[Troiken system/Legends|Troiken system]], Billibango grabbed an active part in the battle scene and saved the lives of soldiers, including [[Jace Dallin]].
